Modern social-first product photography frames SCARLETT wearing a clean white tank top seated at a crisp white vanity inside a bright modern coastal studio, leaning forward in mid-motion with one hand lifting a slim coral lipstick from its minimal box and fingers gently tracing the matte finish, the entire scene bathed in bright natural window light that pours across neutral surfaces creating clean directional shadows and high-key airy highlights, shallow depth of field keeps tactile focus on the lipstick and fingers while softly blurring the minimal studio background, eye-level camera angle with editorial energy and subtle handheld micro-movement

  <reference-images>
    - Image 1 [CHARACTER REF]: SCARLETT - Match the real-world appearance of Sienna Blake exactly
    - Image 2 [LOCATION REF]: INT. BONDI STUDIO - Crisp white vanity bathed in bright window light
    
    IMPORTANT: Reference images CARRY the visual identity of their labeled objects. When the prompt names an UPPERCASE element token, render it faithfully from its ELEMENT REF image — do not generate a new version from the prose. When the prompt names a LOCATION REF, use that image for the environment, lighting, and architectural identity. Prose describes how things are framed, lit, and positioned in the shot — it does not redefine what the reference already shows.
  </reference-images>
